Job Title: L2 & L3 MSP Engineers - Modern Workplace/Azure/Security/Networking
Ad Text:
Saul Recruitment - Specialising in recruiting top MSP/Cloud talent across Oz & NZ!

Looking for a role where you can work on modern workplace and cloud tech, solve real technical challenges and progress your career?

Modern Workplace/Security/Networking!
$80k - $120k + Super + Training
Sydney CBD | Hybrid WFH | Loads of Training and Career Growth!
This is a genuine local success story. An MSP that’s growing fast, investing heavily in its people, and delivering cutting-edge solutions for some fantastic clients.

If you enjoy variety, complex environments and working closely with clients, this will be a great move.

Why This Company Stands Out:

Interesting technical work: Cloud migrations, modern workplace deployments, security solutions and complex environments.
Real career progression: Training, certifications and the chance to expand your technical depth.
Supportive leadership: Managers who understand engineering and back their team.
Hybrid working: Flexibility between home and office.
Collaborative culture: A team of engineers who enjoy sharing knowledge and solving problems together.
This is a business that’s continuing to grow and evolve - and they want engineers who enjoy learning, contributing and making an impact.

** What You’ll Be Doing

Providing Level 2 & 3 engineering support across client environments
(L3): Running client discovery sessions and solution design/architecture
(L3): Delivering complex cloud and infrastructure projects
Assisting clients with forward thinking IT Strategy!
Visiting client sites when required
Acting as a technical advisor to clients
Assist on security projects
Contributing to improving documentation and internal systems
** What You’ll Bring:

Proven L2 or L3 MSP experience supporting multiple client environments
Experience with cloud migrations and modern workplace deployments
Exposure to security solutions and best practices (M365 Security, identity, conditional access etc.)
(L3): Experience with solution design and technical architecture
Experience with modern device management (Intune, Autopilot)
Relevant Microsoft certifications or working towards them
Strong troubleshooting and root-cause problem-solving ability
Experience delivering cloud and infrastructure projects
Confident client communication and advisory skills
Ability to prioritise and manage multiple clients and tasks
Solid documentation habits and attention to detail
A proactive, team-oriented mindset with a passion for learning
** Tech Environment Experience across a mix of:

Microsoft 365
Azure
Entra ID
Intune/Autopilot
On-prem infrastructure
Backup & Disaster Recovery
Networking & Security
Scripting/automation
Windows Virtual Desktop (WVD)
Virtual Machines (VM)
SharePoint, Teams, Power Apps, and Power Automate
Any Cloud migration experience a bonus!
** What’s In It For You?

Work with a growing MSP supporting diverse clients
Learn from experienced engineers and mentors
Access training, certifications and development opportunities
Exposure to modern technologies and cloud platforms
Join a supportive, collaborative technical team
Flexible hybrid working 
This is a real opportunity to shine - and to be recognised and rewarded for it!

Referral Bonus! Know someone who would be perfect? Refer them and receive $2000 if they’re successfully placed!

Insighture is a leading technology consultancy that drives digital transformation for businesses worldwide. With a team of over 85 expert consultants, the company delivers tailored, high-impact strategies and solutions, enabling scalable product engineering. As an AWS partner, Insighture excels in co-integrated cloud services. It has collaborated with more than 50 clients globally, guiding them through cloud adoption, DevOps transformation, enterprise modernisation, and more.

The team’s expertise spans Cloud-Native Development, Solutions Architecture, UI/UX, Quality Engineering, Data Engineering, AI/ML, and DevSecOps. These capabilities empower businesses to achieve impactful and innovative outcomes.

In 2024, Insighture achieved ISO certification and was recognised as a Great Place to Work, earning three prestigious awards: Best Workplace in Sri Lanka, Best Workplace for Technology, and Best Workplace for Young People. Insighture's technology and expertise are embedded in the work of internationally recognised care providers, global freight operations, child protection systems, and health tech platforms across Australia, the UK, and Singapore.

We are seeking a highly experienced Unix Engineer for a 6 months contract to join our growing team.




Requirements

Minimum 7+ years of experience in Unix engineering.

Bachelor’s Degree from an accredited US college or university and should have a Cumulative or major GPA of 3.0 or higher.

Desired Program of Studies : Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, Management Information Systems.




Responsibilities

The Solutions Engineer will Conceptualize, plan and execute Customer Showcases.

Deliver showcases and conduct workshops for various stakeholders from client teams.

Collaborate and work closely with Retail, Banking & Finance, Manufacturing & Tech, Communications, and Healthcare Business Units to map out agendas and visit flows.

Drive SVIC walk-throughs aligned to profile of the customer and the industry.

Evangelize Innovation showcases featuring AI, AR, VR, and IoT Skills and competencies

A strong team player who is comfortable with ambiguity and able to adapt quickly to a startup-like working environment.

A technologist with a good understanding of technology trends in the industry and ability to visualize and articulate the future of technology.

Strategic Business Perspective: consultative approach to understand the industry, customer business, and the market place.

Excellent communication and presentation skills, must have the ability to connect with C-Level leadership.

Demonstrate and appreciate curiosity through domain and technology expertise.
